mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces corporate borrowing costs and compresses equity discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 6.0 percent, labor market slack signals impending economic contraction, causing negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 55 percent of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous monthly decline in retail sales and housing starts indicates collapsing consumer demand, which directly reduces corporate earnings expectations and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST yields positive returns in greater than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of monetary tightening, a sharp drop in industrial production signals supply-side stress that immediately triggers risk-off positioning and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening produce positive 5-day returns in greater than 50 percent of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL increase above 0.4 percent signals accelerating price pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, generating negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than 55 percent of high-inflation months.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands household income and consumer spending capacity, which mechanically supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over 5-year out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: In post-shock recovery phases, a divergence where GDP growth outpaces retail sales indicates business investment leading consumer spending, creating a favorable earnings environment for positive forward returns.
failure_condition: GDPC1 outperformance over RSAFS yields negative returns in greater than 60 percent of recovery quarters.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below its 12-month moving average, manufacturing contraction triggers immediate supply chain risk premiums and negative short-term market returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 50 percent of months where INDPRO crosses below its trend.
